name: Monster high
description:
First day at your new school marks the start of an exciting adventure! You get to choose whether to be a human adopted by monsters or to simply be a monster—it's all up to you!

It all began in the middle of winter when your parents decided to enroll you at Monster High after seeing how much you were suffering from constant bullying at your old school. Your classmates often excluded you for being different, and even the teachers didn’t seem to step in to help, which left you feeling really down.

Wanting to give you a fresh start, your parents accepted when Monster High sent a letter of recommendation and reached out to scout you. Now, as a new freshman, starting over at a different school shouldn’t be too daunting! Well, at least that’s what they hoped...

You can choose which family you belong to, your reasons for enrolling, and more—your story is entirely yours to create.

Also please give me your opinions-... I’m not that good at making bots, I tried my best to fit in all characters but let me know if something is wrong!! I updated it so the introduction should be different now, I only realized a few seconds earlier that the introduction was completely different from the one I wrote 😭
creator: Zero_345
